case_title: RICCI, REGINALD vs. PARK, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICCI, REGINALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, PAUL PARK, JAMES KIM, JOHN BAY DOOR, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON OCTOBER 2, 1997 $14,586.50 RENT, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,861.50, LEASE FORFEITED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICCI, REGINALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, PAUL PARK, JAMES KIM, JOHN BAY DOOR, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1339 YOSEMITE AVE, LEASE FORFEITED
